summary: Complete testing of Lead Proposals Module. All 16 backend API tests pass. Frontend UI testing shows all proposal upload, download, delete, and review workflows working correctly. The proposal section displays properly on Lead Detail page with status badges, file info, review history, and appropriate action buttons based on user role and proposal status.
passed_tests: GET /api/leads/{lead_id}/proposal - Returns null when no proposal exists (200)
GET /api/leads/{lead_id}/proposal - Returns 404 for invalid lead
POST /api/leads/{lead_id}/proposal - Upload PDF proposal (200)
POST /api/leads/{lead_id}/proposal - Upload DOCX proposal (200)
POST /api/leads/{lead_id}/proposal - Reject invalid file types - returns 400
POST /api/leads/{lead_id}/proposal - Reject files > 5MB - returns 400
POST /api/leads/{lead_id}/proposal - New upload replaces old and increments version
GET /api/leads/{lead_id}/proposal/download - Download proposal with base64 file data (200)
GET /api/leads/{lead_id}/proposal/download - Returns 404 when no proposal exists
DELETE /api/leads/{lead_id}/proposal - Uploader can delete when pending_review (200)
DELETE /api/leads/{lead_id}/proposal - Cannot delete if not pending_review (400)
PUT /api/leads/{lead_id}/proposal/review - Approve proposal (200)
PUT /api/leads/{lead_id}/proposal/review - Reject proposal (200)
PUT /api/leads/{lead_id}/proposal/review - Request changes (200)
PUT /api/leads/{lead_id}/proposal/review - Revised proposal gets 'revised' status
PUT /api/leads/{lead_id}/proposal/review - Invalid action returns 400
Frontend: Proposal section visible on Lead Detail page
Frontend: Upload Proposal button and file input work correctly
Frontend: Status badge shows correct status (pending_review, approved, etc.)
Frontend: Proposal card shows file name, version, size, uploader info
Frontend: Download button works and triggers file download
Frontend: Delete button visible only for uploader when pending_review
Frontend: Review actions (Approve, Request Changes, Reject) visible for approver roles
Frontend: Review comment input and history display correctly
Frontend: Replace Proposal option available after upload
Frontend: Success toast messages appear on actions
critical_code_review_comments: PROPOSAL_APPROVER_ROLES properly includes CEO, Director, Vice President, National Sales Head
File type validation correctly enforces PDF, DOC, DOCX only
5 MB file size limit correctly enforced in backend
Version tracking increments correctly on each upload
Delete permission correctly checks uploader ID and pending_review status
Review permission correctly checks user role against PROPOSAL_APPROVER_ROLES
Status transitions work correctly: pending_review -> approved/rejected/changes_requested, changes_requested -> revised

All data-testid attributes present: proposal-section, proposal-upload-input, proposal-download-btn, proposal-delete-btn, proposal-approve-btn, proposal-changes-btn, proposal-reject-btn, review-comment-input, proposal-reupload-input
Base64 encoding/decoding for file storage and download works correctly

success_rate.backend: 100% (16/16 tests passed, 2 skipped due to test user unavailability)

seed_data_creation: Test proposals created during testing. One proposal approved for 'Citadel Hotels & Conventions By Vinnca' lead (CITA-HYD-L26-001)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Lead Proposals module fully tested. Backend endpoints at /api/leads/{lead_id}/proposal (GET, POST, DELETE) and /api/leads/{lead_id}/proposal/download (GET) and /api/leads/{lead_id}/proposal/review (PUT). Approver roles: CEO, Director, Vice President, National Sales Head. Status flow: pending_review -> approved/rejected/changes_requested, changes_requested -> revised (on re-upload). Key test-ids: proposal-section, proposal-upload-input, proposal-download-btn, proposal-delete-btn, proposal-approve-btn, proposal-changes-btn, proposal-reject-btn, review-comment-input.
rca_of_the_issue: No issues found. All proposal endpoints and frontend components working as expected.
